subject: Shipment delay notice
body: Due to port congestion our copper shipment will be delayed by 5 days.

subject: Capacity update
body: We are facing a capacity constraint and can fulfill only 70 percent of next week's order.

subject: Financial advisory
body: Our parent company has initiated insolvency proceedings creating uncertainty for upcoming deliveries.

subject: Quality alert
body: A quality recall has been issued for batch QX-44 and replacement lead time may increase.
